label: Home PV Control
info: Standalone Home PV Control for Home Battery Control users. Controls configured PV limit entities and can optionally select the HBC strategy.

name: Home PV Control logic
Trigger design
info: PV cooldown is flow-owned and strict: every PV write starts cooldown; no PV write is allowed while active; the first evaluation after cooldown expiry may change PV immediately. Hidden-PV reveal is available only when HBC strategy control is enabled, uses a user-configurable capped step, and uses a deadband-aware allocator so small reveal steps are not lost on multi-inverter setups.
